task_completion.visual_evidence: In the GPredict Ground Station configuration list or Edit dialog, the 'Bogus_Test' entry is no longer present.
The 'Old_Demo' tab or window is closed and no longer visible in the main GPredict interface.

task_completion.description: Update the 'Houston' ground station altitude to 14 meters
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Houston ground station configuration dialog shows Altitude set to 14 (or 14m), with Latitude remaining around 29.5502 and Longitude around -95.0970.

task_completion.description: Remove SUOMI NPP and FENGYUN 3A from the 'Research' module, keeping ISS modules
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Research module's configuration or satellite list, SUOMI NPP and FENGYUN 3A are absent, while ISS ZARYA, ISS POISK, and ISS NAUKA are present.

task_completion.description: Add the 'Svalbard' ground station with correct coordinates
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new ground station named 'Svalbard' is visible in the configuration dialog with Latitude 78.2297 N, Longitude 15.3888 E, and Altitude 458 m.

task_completion.description: Set 'Svalbard' as the default ground station
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the GPredict Preferences -> Ground Stations dialog, 'Svalbard' is selected in the 'Default ground station' dropdown.

integrity.description: Agent used the GPredict GUI to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with GPredict dialog boxes (Preferences, Edit Ground Station, Configure Module) rather than terminal windows editing text/config files directly.
The 'Amateur' module tab remains visible and unchanged in the main GPredict interface throughout the screenshots.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual GPredict application
integrity.visual_evidence: The GPredict application window is visible with standard Linux/GTK window decorations and proper UI elements, not a text editor or mockup.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Houston ground station must have Altitude: 14m, Latitude: 29.5502, Longitude: -95.0970. Svalbard ground station must have Latitude: 78.2297, Longitude: 15.3888, Altitude: 458m. The Research module must NOT contain NORAD IDs 37849 (SUOMI NPP) or 32958 (FENGYUN 3A), but MUST contain 25544 (ISS ZARYA), 36086 (ISS POISK), and 49044 (ISS NAUKA).
